comments.body: Do you get the same exception in the debug mode?
Provide some code please. This could be anything...

answers.body:
The crash occurs due to a known issue in older WorkManager versions when calling getHistoricalProcessExitReasons() on some Android-11 devices (especially Samsung).

This device-specific bug triggers an IllegalArgumentException when WorkManager checks for force-stopped status. WorkManager 2.7.1+ added a try-catch block specifically for this IllegalArgumentException on affected devices.

Update your WorkManager dependency to version 2.7.1 or higher. This version includes a patch that gracefully handles the Samsung-specific crash.

This crash occurs due to a Samsung-specific issue in older versions of AndroidX WorkManager, when checking app force-stop status on Android 11. The Samsung implementation of getHistoricalProcessExitReasons() throws an IllegalArgumentException that WorkManager didn't properly handle in versions prior to 2.7.0.

Update WorkManager to 2.7.0 or newer. This version adds explicit handling for this Samsung-specific exception.

In your build.gradle:

dependencies {
    def work_version = "2.8.1" 
    implementation "androidx.work:work-runtime:$work_version"
}

title: android.os.Parcel.createExceptionOrNull Fatal Exception: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException
body:
I am getting this exception on android 11 Samsung device.

This is the stack trace:

        at android.os.Parcel.createExceptionOrNull(Parcel.java:2389)
        at android.os.Parcel.createException(Parcel.java:2369)
        at android.os.Parcel.readException(Parcel.java:2352)
        at android.os.Parcel.readException(Parcel.java:2294)
        at android.app.IActivityManager$Stub$Proxy.getHistoricalProcessExitReasons(IActivityManager.java:11260)
        at android.app.ActivityManager.getHistoricalProcessExitReasons(ActivityManager.java:4231)
        at androidx.work.impl.utils.ForceStopRunnable.isForceStopped(ForceStopRunnable.java:171)
        at androidx.work.impl.utils.ForceStopRunnable.forceStopRunnable(ForceStopRunnable.java:210)
        at androidx.work.impl.utils.ForceStopRunnable.run(ForceStopRunnable.java:108)
        at androidx.work.impl.utils.SerialExecutor$Task.run(SerialExecutor.java:91)
        at java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1167)
        at java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:641)
        at java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:923)

can anyone help me in getting this issue resolved.
